review_threshold.description: At/above this → strength=confident; between min and this → strength=weak.

dedupe_window_hours.description: Future use: window for projection-side dedupe.

per_member_overrides.description: Map of member_id → per-member override block. Values override the global min_confidence / review_threshold for that member.

skip_party_tags.description: If the inbound's resolved party carries any of these tags, the pipeline skips silently per [REFERENCE_EXAMPLES.md §2 line 1024].
